schedule.name: Daytona 500
schedule.summary: Tyler Reddick dominated the 68th Daytona 500, leading 89 laps and holding off a late challenge to claim his first Great American Race. The 23XI Racing driver was flawless in superspeedway traffic.

story_cards.title: Tyler Reddick wins Daytona 500
story_cards.body: Tyler Reddick dominated the 68th Daytona 500, leading 89 laps and holding off a late challenge to claim his first Great American Race. The 23XI Racing driver was flawless in superspeedway traffic.

schedule.name: Autotrader 400
schedule.summary: Back-to-back wins for Reddick. EchoPark's superspeedway-style pack racing played into his hands perfectly. William Byron ran second with Blaney third.

story_cards.title: Tyler Reddick wins Autotrader 400
story_cards.body: Back-to-back wins for Reddick. EchoPark's superspeedway-style pack racing played into his hands perfectly. William Byron ran second with Blaney third.

schedule.name: DuraMax Texas Grand Prix
schedule.summary: Denny Hamlin converted his road course experience into a dominant COTA win. He led 41 of 68 laps and pulled clear in the final stint. Larson finished second with Bell third.

story_cards.title: Denny Hamlin wins DuraMax Texas Grand Prix
story_cards.body: Denny Hamlin converted his road course experience into a dominant COTA win. He led 41 of 68 laps and pulled clear in the final stint. Larson finished second with Bell third.

schedule.name: Straight Talk Wireless 500
schedule.summary: Ryan Blaney finally broke through at Phoenix with a calculated performance. Christopher Bell led the most laps (176) but Blaney made the crucial pass with 28 laps remaining and held on.

story_cards.title: Ryan Blaney wins Straight Talk Wireless 500
story_cards.body: Ryan Blaney finally broke through at Phoenix with a calculated performance. Christopher Bell led the most laps (176) but Blaney made the crucial pass with 28 laps remaining and held on.

schedule.name: Pennzoil 400
schedule.summary: Reddick's third win of 2026. A four-tire call with 40 laps remaining proved the decisive move. Chase Elliott ran second with Chris Buescher taking his best result of the year in fourth.

story_cards.title: Tyler Reddick wins Pennzoil 400
story_cards.body: Reddick's third win of 2026. A four-tire call with 40 laps remaining proved the decisive move. Chase Elliott ran second with Chris Buescher taking his best result of the year in fourth.

schedule.name: Goodyear 400
schedule.summary: Reddick's fourth win in six starts is the most dominant start to a Cup season in years. He converted pole to win at The Lady in Black, leading 77 laps including the final 28. Brad Keselowski swept both stages and finished second.

story_cards.title: Tyler Reddick wins Goodyear 400
story_cards.body: Reddick's fourth win in six starts is the most dominant start to a Cup season in years. He converted pole to win at The Lady in Black, leading 77 laps including the final 28. Brad Keselowski swept both stages and finished second.

schedule.name: NASCAR Cup Race at New Hampshire
